channel.title: Legals on My Discombobulated Brain
channel.description: Recent content in Legals on My Discombobulated Brain

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we handle your data in accordance with UK GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018.

What information we collect

We may collect personal information such as your name, contact details, and any information you provide via our forms or services.

How we use your information

We use your information to provide our services, respond to enquiries, and improve our website. We do not sell your data.

item.title: Safeguarding
item.description:
Safeguarding

We are committed to safeguarding children, young people, and adults at risk. Our safeguarding policy outlines our approach and responsibilities.

Reporting concerns

If you have a safeguarding concern, contact us immediately. We take all reports seriously and act in accordance with UK law.

Last updated: 15 May 2026

item.title: Terms and Conditions
item.description:
Terms and Conditions

By using this website, you agree to comply with these terms. This site is operated by a UK mental health charity.

Use of site

Content is for information only and not a substitute for professional advice. Do not misuse the site or its content.

Limitation of liability

We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from use of this site.

Last updated: 15 May 2026
